entries.title: Nuvei to buy Payoneer for $2.75bn, combining stablecoin receipts, payouts
entries.snippet: Payment technology firm Nuvei has agreed to acquire cross border payments platform Payoneer for $2.75 billion in cash, creating a combined entity processing more than $500 billion in annual payment volume across more than 190 countries. The deal brings together Nuvei’s payment acceptance capabilitie

entries.snippet: Forward Industries is offering to acquire Solana DAT competitors at a premium as their mNAVs slip along with the declining price of SOL.

entries.title: Euro Banking Association analyses drivers for adoption of tokenized money
entries.snippet: The Euro Banking Association (EBA) today announced the publication of a new insight note by its Digital Currencies & Smart Payments Working Group (DSWG) “Adoption of Tokenised Money – Part 2: Considerations of key criteria”.

entries.title: SEC plans to scrap two NMS rules that hinder tokenized stock trading via DeFi AMMs
entries.snippet: The SEC proposed on 11 June to rescind two pillars of Regulation NMS for listed stock trading, the Rule 611 trade through rule and Rule 610(e). It opened a 60 day comment period. Rule 611 bars a trading venue from executing an order at a price worse than the best automated quote displayed at another

entries.title: Onchain gambling keeps rolling with $14B quarter despite crypto slump
entries.snippet: TRM Labs said onchain gambling reached $51 billion in 2025, with repeat users and stablecoin flows helping the sector remain resilient during a broader crypto market pullback.

entries.title: Anchorage backs Treasury's GENIUS AML rules, seeks secondary-market sanctions clarity
entries.snippet: A public comment letter argues that regulated stablecoin issuers need clearer compliance standards to avoid sanctions risks tied to secondary-market activity.

entries.title: Pyth launches 24/7 proprietary indices for US equities, oil and metals
entries.snippet: Pyth is aggregating data from onchain and offchain sources to provide continuous price discovery for major equities and commodities.

entries.title: Hyperliquid, Paradigm urge revision of GENIUS money-laundering rule
entries.snippet: The Hyperliquid Policy Center and Paradigm say the Treasury’s money-laundering rules for the GENIUS Act are too onerous for stablecoin issuers.

entries.title: NYDFS proposes stablecoin regulatory framework
